root.name: Edit slide 2 bullet: 'Lateral Axis' → 'Lateral (Side-to-Side) Axis'
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly changed the bullet point 'Lateral Axis' to 'Lateral (Side-to-Side) Axis' on slide 2, and made no unintended modifications.

children.name: Correct Bullet Text Modification on Slide 2
children.description: Checks if bullet point 'Lateral Axis' on slide 2 has been changed to 'Lateral (Side-to-Side) Axis'.

children.name: No Unintended Changes on Slide 2
children.description: Checks that no text unrelated to the required change was modified on slide 2.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Only allow change from 'Lateral Axis' to 'Lateral (Side-to-Side) Axis', no other changes
    from pptx import Presentation
    original = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    modified = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    try:
        orig_slide = original.slides[1]
    except IndexError:
        return "Slide 2 missing in original presentation.", 0.0
    try:
        mod_slide = modified.slides[1]
    except IndexError:
        return "Slide 2 missing in modified presentation.", 0.0
    # build list of all para texts per shape in both slides
    def get_paras(slide):
        shape_paras = []
        for shape in slide.shapes:
            if not shape.has_text_frame:
                continue
            paras = [p.text.strip() for p in shape.text_frame.paragraphs]
            shape_paras.append(paras)
        return shape_paras
    orig_texts = get_paras(orig_slide)
    mod_texts = get_paras(mod_slide)
    # flatten for comparison, keep index mapping for fine check
    orig_flat = [t for paras in orig_texts for t in paras]
    mod_flat = [t for paras in mod_texts for t in paras]
    # We'll find the minimal difference
    from difflib import SequenceMatcher
    sm = SequenceMatcher(None, orig_flat, mod_flat)
    changes = [(tag, i1, i2, j1, j2) for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in sm.get_opcodes() if tag != 'equal']
    # Accept if the ONLY difference is 'Lateral Axis' => 'Lateral (Side-to-Side) Axis'
    extraneous_diff = False
    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in changes:
        orig_changed = orig_flat[i1:i2]
        mod_changed = mod_flat[j1:j2]
        if orig_changed == ['Lateral Axis'] and mod_changed == ['Lateral (Side-to-Side) Axis']:
            continue  # this is the required change
        # Any other change is extraneous
        extraneous_diff = True
    if extraneous_diff:
        return "There are additional unintended text changes on slide 2.", 0.0
    return "No unintended text changes on slide 2 besides the needed bullet edit.", 1.0

children.name: No Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Check that slides other than slide 2 were not modified in content, animation, or transitions.

metadata.task: On slide 2, Change the bullet point 'Lateral Axis' to 'Lateral (Side-to-Side) Axis'
